name: Fleet Day 0 Technician Onboarding
description: Critical Day 0 onboarding tasks for fleet technicians

steps.title: Vehicle Assignment and System Setup
steps.description: Complete vehicle assignment and update all critical systems

substeps.title: Identify and assign new permanent van #
substeps.description: Identify available vehicle and assign permanent van number to new technician

substeps.title: Update all systems, TPMS, Holman, AMS
substeps.description: Update vehicle assignment in TPMS, Holman fleet management, and AMS systems

substeps.title: Update truck address in TPMS
substeps.description: Update the assigned vehicle's service address and location information in TPMS

substeps.title: Add notes for the truck assignment and status
substeps.description: Document vehicle assignment details, condition, and any special notes in the system

substeps.title: Ensure the original submitter is aware of the correct van # to use
substeps.description: Contact and notify the original request submitter of the assigned vehicle number and details
